mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store( owner_id, store_name, business_number, business_name, location, detail_location, latitude, longitude, store_pic, store_tel, store_info ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{storeName}, #{businessNumber}, #{businessName}, #{location}, #{addressDetail}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{storePic}, #{storeTel}, #{storeInfo} )
mapper.update: UPDATE store SET store_name = #{storeName}, location = #{location}, store_tel = #{storeTel}, business_number = #{businessNumber}, store_pic = #{storePic}, store_info = #{storeInfo} WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
UPDATE store SET holiday = #{holiday}, notice = #{notice}, state = #{state}, business_hours = #{businessHours}, min_price = #{minPrice} WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
mapper.select: SELECT store_id AS storeId, store_name AS storeName, location, store_tel AS storeTel, business_number AS businessNumber, store_pic AS storePic, store_info AS storeInfo, state, holiday, notice FROM store WHERE store_id = #{storeId}

SELECT store_id AS storeId, store_name AS storeName, location, store_tel AS storeTel, business_number AS businessNumber, store_pic AS storePic, store_info AS storeInfo, state, holiday, notice, business_hours AS businessHours, min_price AS minPrice FROM store WHERE owner_id = #{ownerNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT store_id AS storeId, store_name AS storeName, location, store_tel AS storeTel, business_number AS businessNumber, store_pic AS storePic, store_info AS storeInfo, state, holiday, notice, business_hours AS businessHours, min_price AS minPrice FROM store WHERE owner_id = #{ownerNo} ORDER BY store_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu (category_id, name, menu_info, price, menu_pic) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{menuInfo}, #{price}, #{menuPic})
mapper.select: SELECT menu_id AS menuId, name AS name, menu_info AS menuInfo, price, menu_pic AS menuPic FROM menu WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
mapper.update: UPDATE menu SET name = #{name}, menu_info = #{menuInfo}, price = #{price}, menu_pic = #{menuPic}, category_id = #{categoryId} WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu_category (store_id, category, category_order) SELECT store_id, '인기메뉴', 1 FROM store WHERE owner_id = #{userId} ORDER BY store_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(o.order_id) AS orderCount, IFNULL(SUM(o.amount), 0) AS totalSales FROM orders o WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.order_state != 2
AND DATE(o.order_time) = CURDATE()
AND o.order_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND o.order_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND o.order_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)

SELECT od.menu_name AS menuName, SUM(od.quantity) AS totalQuantity, SUM(od.menu_price * od.quantity) AS totalSales, IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(od2.quantity) FROM orders o2 JOIN order_detail od2 ON o2.order_id = od2.order_id WHERE o2.store_id = #{storeId} AND od2.menu_name = od.menu_name AND o2.order_state != 2
AND DATE(o2.order_time) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND o2.order_time BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND o2.order_time BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 MONTH) AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND o2.order_time BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 YEAR) AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
), 0) AS prevQuantity, IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(od2.menu_price * od2.quantity) FROM orders o2 JOIN order_detail od2 ON o2.order_id = od2.order_id WHERE o2.store_id = #{storeId} AND od2.menu_name = od.menu_name AND o2.order_state != 2
AND DATE(o2.order_time) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND o2.order_time BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND o2.order_time BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 MONTH) AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND o2.order_time BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 YEAR) AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
), 0) AS prevSales FROM orders o JOIN order_detail od ON o.order_id = od.order_id WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.order_state != 2
AND DATE(o.order_time) = CURDATE()
AND o.order_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND o.order_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND o.order_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
GROUP BY od.menu_name ORDER BY totalSales DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT m.menu_id AS menuId, m.category_id AS categoryId, m.name AS name, m.menu_info AS menuInfo, m.price, m.menu_pic AS menuPic FROM menu m JOIN menu_category mc ON m.category_id = mc.category_id WHERE mc.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY mc.category_order ASC, m.menu_order ASC
SELECT category_id AS categoryId, category AS categoryName, category_order AS categoryOrder FROM menu_category WHERE store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY category_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu_category (store_id, category, category_order) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{category}, (SELECT IFNULL(MAX(t.category_order), 0) + 1 FROM menu_category t WHERE t.store_id = #{storeId}) )
mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.rating, r.contents, r.photo, u.name AS userName, DATE_FORMAT(r.write_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS date, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(od.menu_name SEPARATOR ', ') FROM order_detail od WHERE od.order_id = r.order_id) AS menuName FROM review r JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = r.order_id JOIN user u ON u.user_no = o.user_no WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY r.write_at DESC
